full_text:
Wang Ping (Zijun) 王平 (子均)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Ping (王平), styledZijun (子均), was born in Dang Qu in Ba Xi. Served Wei but later surrendered to Shu. Served in the northern campaigns. Wang Ping was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom. Wang Ping lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
